rationale.R1.3: The agent flagged a major methodological issue with using BLEU as a reproducibility metric, demonstrating thorough auditing of evidence-claim alignment.
rationale.R1.7: The agent identified one missing citation but did not provide specific citations themselves.
rationale.RX.1: The agent disclosed uncertainty regarding recommendations due to incomplete information.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the agreed scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content was introduced; potential harms were identified.
rationale.RX.5: Major rewrites were traced, but minor edits were not.
